_README: Master registry of vendored / third-party code in this repository. Each entry pins one vendored file to an upstream URL and (optionally) an expected SHA-256.  audit/check_provenance.py walks this list, fetches the upstream content, and reports any divergence.  See HANDOFF.md section on code provenance.

files.divergence_reason: Reroutes EM imports to em_core_patched.py because upstream em_core.py has IndentationError at line 202

files._note: Preserved verbatim including upstream IndentationError at line 202. Not imported; reference only. See em_core_patched.py for the usable version.

files.divergence_reason: Fixes 1-character indentation typo at line 202 of em_fit_ms_garch that breaks Python parsing
files.patch_description: Line 202: changed `     for it in range(max_iter):` (5 spaces) to `    for it in range(max_iter):` (4 spaces). All other lines verbatim from upstream; docstring header prepended describing the divergence.

originality_check._doc: Files in our code/ that USE this package.  Each must import from the vendor dir, NOT reproduce algorithm code inline.  audit/check_provenance.py greps for forbidden symbols.
originality_check._doc_forbidden: These symbol definitions must NOT appear in consumer_files (they live only in the vendored package).  Consumer files may import these names.
